values.fullName: Fonds monétaire à valeur liquidative variable %28VNAV%29 court terme
Obligations et%2Fou titres de créances libellés en euros
Risks associated with Asset Backed Securities %28ABD%29 or Mortgage backed Securities %28MBS%29
Risks associated with credit derivative transactions
Risks associated with hedging foreign currency units
Risks associated with investments in debt securities
Risks associated with management of collateral
fund%27s investment strategy is not depenent on ref%2E indicator
funds universe is partly derived from ref%2E indicator
